summary: Iteration 193: Analisi AI Page - All features verified. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements working correctly including Analisi AI button navigation, editable weights with live price updates, /fpc redirect, and Confronto functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: PreventivoEditorPage: 'Analisi AI' button (data-testid='btn-analisi-ai') correctly placed in toolbar after FPC button, navigates to /analisi-ai/:prevId
AnalisiAIPage: Dark theme UI with live KPI cards (peso, ore, subtotale, totale), editable materiali table, riepilogo costi, and confronto section
Weight editing: Click on peso value opens inline input, save updates all calculations in real-time (tested: 2599kg -> 3000kg, totale changed from 17,315.63€ to 18,204.79€)
PUT /api/preventivi/:id correctly accepts and saves peso_totale_kg, ore_stimate, predittivo_data fields
/fpc route correctly redirects to /tracciabilita (React Navigate component)
Confronto section: Dropdown shows 45 preventivi, selecting one and clicking Confronta shows confidence score, scostamento, and insights
App.js has redirect: <Route path='/fpc' element={<Navigate to='/tracciabilita' replace />} />
seed_data_creation: Used existing preventivo prev_d1b1e1e3e3cb (PV-2026-0045-AI) for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 193 tested the Analisi AI page integration. Key findings: (1) PreventivoEditorPage has 'Analisi AI' button (data-testid='btn-analisi-ai') that navigates to /analisi-ai/:prevId. (2) AnalisiAIPage shows preventivo with editable materiali table - click on peso value to edit, save updates all calculations live. (3) KPI cards show live-peso, live-subtotale, live-totale with data-testid attributes. (4) Riepilogo Costi section shows cost breakdown with margins. (5) Confronto section has dropdown (data-testid='select-manual-prev') and Confronta button (data-testid='btn-run-confronto'). (6) /fpc route redirects to /tracciabilita. (7) PUT /api/preventivi/:id accepts peso_totale_kg, ore_stimate, predittivo_data fields. (8) Session cookie name is 'session_token'.

confronto_test.selected_preventivo: PV-2026-0043-MAN - Solaio Carpenteria A2 - Sasso Marconi (MANUALE)
